# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.
# Category: api_gateway_security

_format_version: "1.1"
admin:
  http_port: 8001
  https_port: 8445
database:
  dbname: kong
  user: postgres
  password: kongpass
  host: localhost
  port: 5432
nginx_worker_processes: 2
nginx_http_client_max_body_size: 10m
nginx_socket_buffer_size: 8k
nginx_ssl_protocols: TLSv1.2
pg_hba_conf:
  - "host all all 0.0.0.0/0 md5"
  - "host replication kong 0.0.0.0/0 md5"
kong:
  worker_processes: 4
  nginx_http_real_ip_header: 'X-Real-IP'
  daemon_worker_nodes: 2
  proxy_access_log: off
consumers:
 - username: consumer1
   custom_id: 5d8cb390-b627-424a-ab6c-be9afe6f0dae
 - username: consumer2
   custom_id: c7b43ad5-70ee-42ce-ac61-dbdded0b8ebd
services:
  - name: service1
    url: 'http://service1.com'
  - name: service2
    url: 'http://service2.com'
routes:
  - name: route1
    paths:
      - /service1
    service:
      name: service1
  - name: route2
    paths:
      - /service2
    service:
      name: service2
plugins:
  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      hour: 500
